message:
fix(enums): add const fn as_str() to enum types and route Display through them

Add as_str() const methods to several enums whose string representations
were only available through fmt::Display, eliminating allocation overhead
and making the string contract explicit and testable:

- benchmark_freshness_gate: ShiftSeverity, ShiftDomain, FreshnessLevel,
  RolloutTrustLevel as_str() + Display delegation; strengthen content
  hashes in AlarmLedger, evaluate_claim, and batch_evaluate to include
  individual alarm details, per-domain freshness, reasons, and verdict
  hashes; add as_str/Display consistency tests
- hindsight_escalation_bundle: EscalationTriggerKind and TriggerSeverity
  as_str(); recompute_hash and EscalationBundle hash now use as_str()
  instead of {:?}; EscalationReceipt decision hash uses .to_string();
  add trigger_kind/severity as_str matches Display tests
- parser_multi_engine_harness: DriftCategory::as_str() const method

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
